youtube_chapters:
0:00 Intro
0:12 Configure the slide
0:24 Preview and present live
youtube_chapters_notes: 3 chapters, all >=10s apart, validated against r8 (46.15s = 43.5s tutorial + 2.65s outro). Apply by pasting into YouTube video description at publish time. Also stored in using-the-open-ended-slide.chapters.txt.
notes: r8: Removed redundant s08 VO ('Answers appear live...') at ~0:37; kept only s09 as closing line. s09 tts_text uses 'lyve' spelling for /laɪv/ pronunciation (ElevenLabs alias). s09 start_sec moved from 40.0s to 35.2s to fill gap left by removed s08. s09 audio_duration 2.95s. check_vo_overlap.py PASS. 8 clips total (s01-s07 + s09). Same visual track as r7 (43.5s). Branded outro splash_intro_BD.webm 2.65s. Total: 46.15s.

steps.display_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words.
steps.tts_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words.

steps.display_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your question. Make it specific to spark a real response.
steps.tts_text: Type your question. Make it specific to spark a real response.

steps.display_text: Grid shows all responses at once. One by one reveals them individually.
steps.tts_text: Grid shows all responses at once. One by one reveals them individually.

steps.display_text: Hit Preview to rehearse the slide and see the participant view before going live.
steps.tts_text: Hit Preview to rehearse the slide and see the participant view before going live.

steps.display_text: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly.
steps.tts_text: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly.

steps.display_text: When you're ready, hit Present to go live with your audience.
steps.tts_text: When you're ready, hit Present to go lyve with your audience.

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i open-ended-r7-final.webm -i vo/s01.mp3 -i vo/s02.mp3 -i vo/s03.mp3 -i vo/s04.mp3 -i vo/s05.mp3 -i vo/s06.mp3 -i vo/s07.mp3 -i vo/s09.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6000|6000[a2];[3:a]adelay=10000|10000[a3];[4:a]adelay=15000|15000[a4];[5:a]adelay=20000|20000[a5];[6:a]adelay=24200|24200[a6];[7:a]adelay=29200|29200[a7];[8:a]adelay=35200|35200[a8];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8]amix=inputs=8:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k open-ended-r8-narrated.webm
